title: React Tic-Tac-Toe Game
subtitle: Interactive 4x4 Tic-Tac-Toe with AI opponent and responsive design
challenge: Implement efficient win detection on a 4x4 board with multiple win conditions (rows, columns, diagonals), and integrate a computer AI that suggests valid moves without requiring complex minimax algorithms for this extended board size.
architecture: Component-based React architecture with functional components and hooks for state management; game logic separated into helper functions with constant definitions for player states and game conditions, implementing an event-driven pattern for user interactions.
